failure_surface: Repeated SyntaxError on every code execution attempt due to empty or malformed Python code content inside tool calls
root_cause: The agent invoked the code execution tool without generating valid, executable Python code within the function parameters, resulting in immediate syntax failures that prevented any spreadsheet processing
minimal_fix_hypothesis: Before invoking any code execution tool, validate that the generated code block contains syntactically correct Python with proper indentation, complete statements, and non-empty content
evidence: All 5 code execution attempts returned 'SyntaxError: invalid syntax' at Cell In[1], line 1
The solution field shows an execute_python_code function call with no visible Python code between the opening and closing tags
No spreadsheet data was read, processed, or written because code execution never succeeded beyond line 1
The evaluation result shows test_case_results of 0, indicating complete failure to meet any success criteria

memory_items.title: Code Block Content Validation
memory_items.lesson: Always verify that code execution tool calls contain complete, syntactically valid Python before submission
memory_items.generalization: Empty or truncated code blocks will cause immediate execution failures; use linters or syntax checkers during generation

memory_items.title: Tool Invocation Hygiene
memory_items.lesson: Do not submit function calls with missing or incomplete parameter content
memory_items.generalization: Each tool invocation must have properly structured arguments; partial calls lead to cascading failures

memory_items.title: Execution Loop Detection
memory_items.lesson: When repeated syntax errors occur on identical lines, stop and diagnose code generation issues before continuing
memory_items.generalization: Multiple identical failures indicate a systematic problem in code production, not environmental issues

edits.content:
## Execution Tool Reliability
- Before executing any Python code, ensure the code block is complete with proper indentation and no truncated content.
- Validate that tool invocation parameters contain all required fields before submitting.
- If multiple consecutive code executions fail with the same error, halt and re-examine the code generation pipeline before retrying.
